text: The concept of the Metaverse is being hyped by large multinationals and it has become trendy to talk about the Metaverse and Web 3.0, Blockchain, NFT and Cryptocurrencies. From a scientific perspective, there is no agreement as yet on the concrete features of the Metaverse. In this paper, we present scientific definitions and main characteristics of the Metaverse based on a Systematic Literature Review (SLR). In particular, we introduce two possible definitions summarizing the main features of the Metaverse, where the first one is a basic, very holistic one, stating that the Metaverse is “a three-dimensional online environment in which users, who are identified by avatars, interact each other in virtual spaces located in the cyberspace and that are geographically distant from the physical space of the real world”. A more detailed and fleshed out version is given in the second definition of the Metaverse that is further discussed in the paper. These definitions may serve the purpose of being a starting point for the application of system science, information system theory, information system science, computer science and business informatics, and contribute to a research foundation by mentioning open issues. Finally, we also provide a first discussion on the potential social, economic and technological effects of the Metaverse and the necessary conditions for the successful implementation of such a concept.
headline: Fully Human Written
prediction: We believe that this document is fully human-written
